2604.07066.title: SemEval-2026 Task 3: Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA)
2604.07066.paper_summary: We present the SemEval-2026 shared task on Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA), which improves traditional ABSA by modeling sentiment along valence-arousal (VA) dimensions rather than using categorical polarity labels. To extend ABSA beyond consumer reviews to public-issue discourse (e.g., political, energy, and climate issues), we introduce an additional task, Dimensional Stance Analysis (DimStance), which treats stance targets as aspects and reformulates stance detection as regression in the VA space. The task consists of two tracks: Track A (DimABSA) and Track B (DimStance). Track A includes three subtasks: (1) dimensional aspect sentiment regression, (2) dimensional aspect sentiment triplet extraction, and (3) dimensional aspect sentiment quadruplet extraction, while Track B includes only the regression subtask for stance targets. We also introduce a continuous F1 (cF1) metric to jointly evaluate structured extraction and VA regression. The task attracted more than 400 participants, resulting in 112 final submissions and 42 system description papers. We report baseline results, discuss top-performing systems, and analyze key design choices to provide insights into dimensional sentiment analysis at the aspect and stance-target levels. All resources are available on our GitHub repository.
2604.07066.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 SemEval-2026 共享任務，主題為維度基於方面的情感分析（DimABSA），這一方法通過沿著價值-喚起（VA）維度建模情感，而不是使用類別極性標籤，來改進傳統的 ABSA。為了將 ABSA 擴展到公共議題話語（例如，政治、能源和氣候問題），我們引入了一個額外的任務，維度立場分析（DimStance），該任務將立場目標視為方面，並將立場檢測重新表述為 VA 空間中的回歸。該任務由兩個賽道組成：賽道 A（DimABSA）和賽道 B（DimStance）。賽道 A 包括三個子任務：（1）維度方面情感回歸，（2）維度方面情感三元組提取，以及（3）維度方面情感四元組提取，而賽道 B 僅包括針對立場目標的回歸子任務。我們還引入了一個連續 F1（cF1）指標，以共同評估結構化提取和 VA 回歸。該任務吸引了超過 400 名參與者，最終提交了 112 份作品和 42 篇系統描述論文。我們報告基準結果，討論表現最佳的系統，並分析關鍵設計選擇，以提供對於方面和立場目標層面的維度情感分析的見解。所有資源均可在我們的 GitHub 存儲庫中獲得。
2604.07066.author: Liang-Chih Yu et.al.
2604.07066.authors: Liang-Chih Yu, Jonas Becker, Shamsuddeen Hassan Muhammad, Idris Abdulmumin, Lung-Hao Lee, Ying-Lung Lin, Jin Wang, Jan Philip Wahle, Terry Ruas, Natalia Loukachevitch, Alexander Panchenko, Ilseyar Alimova, Lilian Wanzare, Nelson Odhiambo, Bela Gipp, Kai-Wei Chang, Saif M. Mohammad
